CreateAction.execution: Execution mode. SAVE (save only), RUN (run only), SAVE_AND_RUN (save and run)
CreateAction.action.id: Command ID, auto-generated by the system, only available for saved commands
CreateAction.action.ref: Action ID, used only for update command API. Typically references an existing Action ID, e.g., in command execution scenarios (not returned by command list query)
CreateAction.action.name: Command name, only available for saved commands
CreateAction.action.fileUpload: File upload details, required when type=FILE_UPLOAD
CreateAction.action.supportedInstanceTypes: List of instance types supported by this public command. Used to determine which instance list to display when creating and executing a command. Currently supports: BCC, BBC, HPAS
CreateAction.action.createdTimestamp: Command creation time. Unix timestamp in milliseconds
CreateAction.action.updatedTimestamp: Last modification time of the command. Unix timestamp in milliseconds
CreateAction.parameters: Parameter values for command execution, required only when the command has parameters
CreateAction.targetSelectorType: Instance selector type, required only when execution mode is RUN or SAVE_AND_RUN. Default: INSTANCES_LIST. Options: INSTANCES_LIST (instance list), ALL_INSTANCES (all instances), TAG_INSTANCES (instance tag selection), INSTANCES_IMPORT (instance list import)
CreateAction.targets: List of instance IDs, required only when targetSelectorType is INSTANCES_LIST
